title: Abortions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Abortions 11 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details LILITH CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM ABORTION CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides abortion care up to 28 weeks and 0 days into pregnancy, including pregnancy tests, and ultrasounds to confirm gestational age. Other services include STI testing for Gonorrhea, Chlamydia, and Trichomoniasis. 511 SW 10th Avenue Suite 904 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office hours: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Thursday 9am-6pm Clinic days and surgical procedures: Friday-Saturday 8am-3pm. Clinic days may change during holiday weekends or for clinic's monthly Saturday closure. Email (503) 221-1870 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetric and gynecological services. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks, surgical abortion not offered at this location. 12220 SW 1st Street Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 11am-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling.
